themes.label: Wisdom
themes.summary: This chapter points toward wisdom, understanding, discernment, counsel, or instruction. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 8 verses. Word-study detail reinforces "חָכָ֣ם: wise - wise, (i.e., intelligent, skilful or artful)".
